lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
The vehicle is in mint condition. There is no wear on the interior or exterior. All systems are fully functional. The vehicle is in like-new condition.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic find! This vehicle is in good condition and has clearly been well cared for over the years. You'll find it reliable and ready for many more miles, showing only the minor signs of use you'd expect from a well-loved car. It’s a solid, dependable choice for anyone looking for quality and value!
This vehicle is in fair condition. The interior and exterior show moderate wear and some cosmetic issues. Mechanical systems are operational but require some maintenance or minor repairs.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant attention from its next owner. The exterior shows extensive wear, including several large rust spots on the wheel wells, multiple deep scratches, and a cracked rear bumper. Mechanically, the car is struggling; the engine has a noticeable oil leak and a rough idle, while the transmission occasionally slips during gear changes. Inside, the upholstery is heavily stained with several tears in the driver's seat, and the air conditioning is currently non-functional. It is being sold as-is and would likely serve best as a project car or for parts.

This vehicle is in good condition, reflecting a history of careful ownership and regular maintenance. Mechanically, the car is solid; the engine starts easily and the transmission shifts smoothly through all gears. We have recently replaced the brake pads and the tires still have plenty of tread remaining. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-preserved, though there is some light wear on the upholstery and floor mats. The exterior paint still shines beautifully, but a close inspection will reveal a few small rock chips on the front fascia and a minor door ding on the passenger side. Overall, this is a dependable vehicle that is ready for its next owner with no immediate mechanical issues expected.

This exceptional vehicle exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Presenting in well-maintained condition, it has undergone a rigorous inspection process to ensure it meets our exacting standards for safety and performance. Prospective owners will appreciate the seamless fusion of durability and sophistication. This offering represents a premier opportunity to acquire a high-caliber automobile at a compelling market valuation.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and honestly, she's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved over the years—perfect for someone who wants a dependable car that still looks great on the road. I’ve taken good care of it, and it runs like a dream! I'm looking for a quick, smooth sale, so come take a look—you're going to love how it handles!

This meticulously maintained 2019 Audi Q5 Premium Plus offers a refined driving experience with a focus on both performance and comfort. The exterior paint retains a high-gloss finish, showing only minor cosmetic imperfections from standard road use, while the 19-inch alloy wheels are wrapped in tires with excellent tread depth. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of luxury, featuring supple leather upholstery, a panoramic sunroof, and the intuitive Audi Virtual Cockpit, all of which remain in great working order. Mechanically, the vehicle is sound; the 2.0T turbocharged engine delivers smooth acceleration, and the Quattro all-wheel-drive system provides confident handling in all weather conditions. It comes with a documented service history, ensuring that all scheduled maintenance has been performed on time. This is a reliable, well-presented SUV that balances sophistication with everyday utility.
